description_long: This object depicts a highly distorted adult pedestrian figure, with exaggeratedly elongated arms stretching far above the head and an unnaturally extended neck and head. The figure appears to be in a crouched or squatting position, with both knees bent and feet flat on the ground. The clothing is form-fitting, with visible seams and details suggesting athletic or casual wear, and the shoes are simple and low-profile. The face is detailed and expressive, with long hair styled back, and the hands are gripping or attached to the ends of the elongated arms. The overall proportions are surreal, with the arms and neck forming sharp, angular lines that dominate the silhouette. The surface finish is smooth and the object appears to be made primarily of a plastic or resin-like material.
description: A surreal, distorted adult pedestrian figure with extremely elongated arms and neck, crouched with detailed facial features and athletic-style clothing. The object's proportions are exaggerated, with smooth surfaces and a striking, angular silhouette.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, long hair, and both arms stretched upward in a V-shape, with the body crouched and legs bent.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extreme elongation of the neck and arms, with the head and hands extended far from the torso.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the V-shaped arms, and the bent legs from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the stretched neck and arms, with the crouched posture and visible facial profile.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic wear with fitted pants and a long-sleeve top
attribute_posture: crouching with arms and neck extremely extended
